Claude Training · Live & Hands-On

Your team is using Claude.
Are they using it well?

Most teams are getting 20% of what Claude can actually do. This training closes that gap — with real workflows, live practice, and systems your team will actually use the next day.

Request Training → See Training Formats
3–4x output per person for teams with structured Claude workflows
1 day from zero to functional AI-native workflows in your team's context
80% of teams using Claude are leaving most of its capability untouched
Live hands-on sessions — not recorded courses, not slide decks
Training Formats

Three ways to run it.
All of them hands-on.

Every format is built around your team's actual work — not generic AI demos. We use your real use cases, your real content, your real workflows.

Most Popular
Half-Day Team Workshop
4 hours with your team. We build real workflows in the session — by the end, everyone leaves with working prompts and systems in their actual Claude account.
4 hours, remote or in-person Up to 20 participants Custom to your team's function Prompt library delivered post-session
Executive Track
1:1 Executive Intensive
A focused 90-minute session for CMOs, CROs, and CEOs. We build your personal Claude operating system — how you think, write, decide, and delegate with AI.
90 minutes, 1:1 C-suite and VP level Strategic + hands-on Follow-up 30-min check-in included
Full Rollout
Company-Wide Training Program
A structured multi-session program for organizations going AI-native. We train in layers — leadership first, then function leads, then full teams — with consistent frameworks throughout.
Multi-session over 2–4 weeks 50+ person organizations Department-specific customization Internal champion training included
What Gets Built

Not a course.
A working system.

Every session ends with something tangible. Here's what teams typically leave with.

01
A Team Prompt Library
30–50 production-ready prompts built specifically for your team's function — content, outreach, analysis, reporting, strategy.
02
Custom Claude Projects
Configured Claude Projects with your brand voice, ICP, style guides, and context baked in — so every output is on-brand from the first draft.
03
AI-Native Workflows
Documented step-by-step workflows for your highest-leverage tasks — the ones where Claude compresses hours of work into minutes.
04
Prompting Fundamentals
Every participant leaves understanding how Claude actually works — so they can adapt and build on their own, not just copy-paste prompts.
05
Use Case Playbook
A prioritized map of where AI creates the most leverage in your specific role and organization — with a roadmap for what to tackle first.
06
Internal Adoption Framework
For full rollouts: a framework for sustaining adoption, tracking usage, and expanding AI-native practices across the organization over time.
Who It's For

Built for teams that are serious about AI — not just experimenting.

📣
Marketing & GTM Teams
Content, campaigns, outbound copy, competitive research, SEO briefs, brand voice — Claude can compress your team's highest-volume work by 60–80%.
🎯
Executives & Leaders
Think faster, write sharper, prepare better. Build a personal AI operating system that makes you a more effective decision-maker and communicator.
🏢
Leadership Teams
Align your entire leadership team on how AI gets used — with a consistent framework, shared vocabulary, and department-specific training for each function.
⚡
Agencies & Consultants
Deliver more for clients with less overhead. Build Claude workflows into your service delivery — faster research, faster drafts, faster iteration at scale.
Why It's Different

Not a course.
Not a demo.
Your actual work.

Most AI training shows you what's possible. This training builds what you'll actually use — starting from your team's real content, real workflows, and real challenges.

→ Built on your context. We use your brand voice, your ICP, your existing content — not fictional examples. Every prompt we build works in your actual environment.
→ Live practice, not slides. Participants spend the majority of time inside Claude, building and testing — not watching someone else present.
→ Operator mindset, not hype. No promises about AGI or abstract AI futures. This is practical, workflow-first training from someone who uses Claude daily to run multiple businesses.
→ You leave with working systems. Prompt libraries, Claude Projects, workflows — all configured and ready to use the next day. Not ideas. Not homework.
→ Delivered by someone who's actually AI-native. Bill runs four businesses with AI as the operational backbone — this training comes from daily practice, not a curriculum.
Looking for something broader?

Claude for Small Business — full implementation

Training is one piece. We also build out the full Claude infrastructure for your business — from prompts and Projects to team-wide workflows.
